title: matricaria coronaria
intro: Matricaria coronaria, commonly known as Trailing or Italian Camomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Matricaria coronaria include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. Herbal preparations of Matricaria coronaria include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
